author: y4rr
content: Audit-Fix Phase 6 APPROVE (clean). Both BROKEN tests (#1034, #1035) strengthened: mixed-sign input via (0..N).map(|i| (i as f32) - N/2.0) replacing zeros(&[N, 10]); elementwise relu verification (out[i] == data[i].max(0.0)); three-part inline sabotage probe (input has negative, output has 0.0 from clamp, output has strictly positive from pass-through). Existing shape assertion retained. Sabotage demo: input[0] flip from -20.0 to 5.0 caught at line 486 (got=5, expected=0). No src/ changes, no new workspace deps.
